refnamediv.refpurpose: Calculates main and interaction effects using Yate's algorithm.

listitem.para: a (n-1)-by-k matrix of doubles, the identification matrix of main and interaction effects.

a n-by-1 vector of doubles, containing average response, main effects and interaction effects. EF(1,:) is the average response and EF(2:$,:) contain the main effects and interaction effects corresponding to the vector ID.
a n-by-1 vector of doubles, containing the calculated response from a two-level complete factorial design in standard order
the boolean operator %T. It sorts the id matrix and the corresponding ef vector, so that main effects are first, followed by two-factor and three-factor interactions. Default is %F.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Calculates main and interaction effects using Yate's algorithm.
This function is adopted from the WAFO toolbox : http://www.maths.lth.se/matstat/wafo/documentation/wafodoc/wafo/wstats/yates.html

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting: D = scidoe_ff2n(3); // complete 2^3 design in standard order. y = [60 72 54 68 52 83 45 80]'; // Responses to design D. [ef,id] = scidoe_yates(y)

refsection.title: Bibliography
refsection.para: Box, G.E.P, Hunter, W.G. and Hunter, J.S. (1978)
Statistics for experimenters, John Wiley & Sons, pp 342
